# Input Group

Places icons, text, and compact actions inside an input or textarea boundary.

## Contents

- [Installation](#installation)
- [Usage](#usage)
- [Addon alignment](#addon-alignment)
- [Buttons and text](#buttons-and-text)
- [Values and states](#values-and-states)
- [Accessibility](#accessibility)
- [Recommendations](#recommendations)

## Installation

Add the Input Group component from the configured StackTrace registry.

```shell
npx shadcn-vue@latest add @stacktrace/input-group
```

## Usage

Use `InputGroup` when a prefix, suffix, icon, counter, or compact action is part of the control itself. Use `InputGroupInput` or `InputGroupTextarea` inside the group so the child control shares the group's focus and invalid styles.

**Inline addons example**

```vue
<template>
  <div class="grid w-full max-w-sm gap-6">
    <InputGroup>
      <InputGroupInput placeholder="Search…" />
      <InputGroupAddon>
        <SearchIcon />
      </InputGroupAddon>
      <InputGroupAddon align="inline-end">
        12 results
      </InputGroupAddon>
    </InputGroup>

    <InputGroup>
      <InputGroupInput placeholder="example.com" />
      <InputGroupAddon>
        <InputGroupText>https://</InputGroupText>
      </InputGroupAddon>
      <InputGroupAddon align="inline-end">
        <InputGroupButton>Open</InputGroupButton>
      </InputGroupAddon>
    </InputGroup>
  </div>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { SearchIcon } from '@lucide/vue'
import {
  InputGroup,
  InputGroupAddon,
  InputGroupButton,
  InputGroupInput,
  InputGroupText,
} from '@/Components/InputGroup'
</script>
```

## Addon alignment

`InputGroupAddon` defaults to `inline-start`. Use `inline-end` for a suffix or trailing action. Reserve `block-start` and `block-end` for content above or below a multiline control. Alignment changes visual order, so keep the addon after the control in the template for predictable focus navigation.

Clicking a non-button inline addon focuses the nested input. Keep decorative icons unfocusable and give every icon-only `InputGroupButton` an `aria-label`.

### Textarea composition

Pair `InputGroupTextarea` with a block addon for counters, formatting hints, or a tightly related action. Keep longer help and validation messages outside the group in a `Field`.

**Textarea with footer example**

```vue
<template>
  <InputGroup class="w-full max-w-md">
    <InputGroupTextarea
      v-model="message"
      maxlength="280"
      placeholder="Write a reply…"
    />
    <InputGroupAddon align="block-end">
      <InputGroupText>{{ message.length }}/280</InputGroupText>
      <InputGroupButton class="ml-auto" variant="default">
        Send
      </InputGroupButton>
    </InputGroupAddon>
  </InputGroup>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import {
  InputGroup,
  InputGroupAddon,
  InputGroupButton,
  InputGroupText,
  InputGroupTextarea,
} from '@/Components/InputGroup'
import { ref } from 'vue'

const message = ref('')
</script>
```

## Buttons and text

`InputGroupText` applies consistent typography to non-interactive prefixes and suffixes. `InputGroupButton` defaults to the low-emphasis `ghost` variant and `xs` size. It also supports `sm`, `icon-xs`, and `icon-sm`; reserve icon sizes for actions with an accessible name.

## Values and states

Bind `v-model` directly to the nested input or textarea, not to `InputGroup`. Put `disabled`, `readonly`, and `aria-invalid` on that control as well. The group detects focus and invalid state from descendants and draws the shared border and ring.

## Accessibility

Input Group does not provide a field label. Wrap the complete group in `Field` and associate `FieldLabel` with the nested control id. Do not put essential instructions only in a prefix or placeholder, and avoid several adjacent actions when a toolbar or menu would be easier to navigate.

## Recommendations

> **Use Input for an unadorned value: [Input](https://ui.stacktrace.sk/docs/components/input)**
>
> If there is no meaningful content inside the control boundary, use a regular Input. Input Group should clarify or enable the value, not add decoration to every field.

Hosted documentation: [Input Group](https://ui.stacktrace.sk/docs/components/input-group)
